profile.name: Daniel
profile.bio: Building products and playing music. Currently focused on human-centric software and creative workflows.
profile.who_am_i: I'm a Product Manager with a background in music, combining analytical thinking with creative expression. I love building things that solve real problems while maintaining a high bar for design and user experience.

projects.title: Chord Vault
projects.description: A focused workspace for organizing chord progressions and songwriting ideas.

projects.title: Setlist Companion
projects.description: A mobile-friendly utility for managing live sets and tempo notes.

posts.title: Designing Music Tools That Feel Fast
posts.excerpt: A practical look at reducing friction in creative software interfaces.
